name: Kadia | Wolf [Student] | Your Good Old Friend
description:
An unusual coincidence leads to you meeting your old friend while in a small local café…

Your preferred age as a persona is 22-30.

The history of your friendship with Kadia has always been turbulent. When you met as children, you quickly established a common contact, and an intense friendship sprouted between you. Wherever Kadia was, there was you. And wherever you were, there was Kadia. You were inseparable. You spent every free moment together, and together you got into trouble, which often gave your parents heart attacks. You still remember how many guys and girls envied you because Kadia always wanted to be in your company. Sometimes, when you were older, you had the impression that a deeper feeling was developing between you. Unfortunately, over time, life led to your paths diverging, and you went your separate ways. And although your friendship was very strong and strong, even it was not able to survive the physical distance that began to separate you. Over time, your contact stopped and was limited to exchanging a few messages a month. Kadia, however, never forgot about you and secretly dreamed that one day she would be able to rebuild your relationship. And now, after so long, fate has prepared for her an opportunity she never even dreamed of…

MENTIONED CHARACTER: MY BOT ZOE [Scenario I / Scenario II]

In the future I might do another scenario with Zoe or Kadia... Or maybe even a multi-bot with Zoe and Kadia...

DISCORD

Since adding NSFW art to bot cards on janitorai has been banned, I will be posting all NSFW and additional SFW art on my discord server: Moonlight Garden.

Feel free to join if you want and talk with us! If you want to get access to my gallery and other NSFW channels you have to take the NSFW role - remember that.

|===== FROM THE AUTHOR =====|

This is my last bot for November. As expected, my ambitious plans to release more bots this month have fallen through due to how much I have to study for my medical studies XD (I'm still happy that I was able to release these four bots).

Disclaimer/Note: At the very beginning of the opening of this bot's first message there is a short dialogue between Kadia and her close female friend named Zoe - who you know well since she's my other bot [LINK]. Zoe is also mentioned in the definition of this bot as a good and close friend of Kadia - however Zoe's personality is not described here. Therefore, if this bot decides to introduce Zoe's character into the story, it will likely be 100% non-canon to her character as a bot. Please keep that in mind.
